title: Power Pickaxe
description: A powerful 3x3 mining pickaxe with custom amethyst sounds and 1,000 uses. Perfect for survival servers!
body:
✦ Power Pickaxe ✦
Take your mining to the next level with the Power Pickaxe! This isn't just a regular tool; it's a magical mining machine designed for players who want to clear out huge areas quickly and with style.

✨ Key Features
3x3 Area Mining: Every swing breaks a 3x3 area of blocks!

Magical Sounds: Features custom Amethyst sound effects every time you mine.

Clean Durability: The pickaxe is "Unbreakable," meaning the durability bar won't clutter your screen.

Limited Uses: To keep things balanced, it has 1,000 powerful uses. When it hits 0, the power fades and the pickaxe breaks!

⚒️ Crafting Recipe
Want to craft one for yourself? You'll need some rare materials! Place them in a Crafting Table like this:

Top Row: Netherite Ingot | Amethyst Shard | Diamond

Middle Row: (Empty) | Emerald | (Empty)

Bottom Row: (Empty) | Stick | (Empty)

(Tip: You can use the /power-pickaxe give command if you're an Admin!)

⚙️ Admin Commands
If you have Operator (OP) permissions, you can use these commands to control the plugin:

/power-pickaxe give — Give yourself a fresh Power Pickaxe.

/power-pickaxe on — Enable the crafting recipe for all players.

/power-pickaxe off — Disable the crafting recipe.

🚀 Compatibility
This plugin is designed to run on Paper, Spigot, Purpur, and Bukkit servers for versions 1.21.x.

Enjoy mining! If you like the plugin, feel free to leave a comment!
